offlineMessage:
Could not connect to Companion Engine.

Have you downloaded and run the desktop application?

downloadMessage: To train models locally, you need to download and install the Annotix Companion Engine.
downloadHint: The Companion Engine will run in the background on your PC and allow training models with your annotated data.
downloadStarted: Download started. Run the installer when finished.
